related_datasets.name: rcds/wikipedia-persons-masked
related_datasets.description: ~70k Wikipedia pages about people with full text

related_datasets.name: wikimedia/structured-wikipedia
related_datasets.description: Official Wikimedia dataset with structured articles, infoboxes, and Wikidata QIDs

notes: Wikipedia biographical data extracted from infoboxes and Wikidata properties. These dimensions ground personas in real biographical data from 6M+ Wikipedia articles covering real people (filtered to exclude fictional characters). Dimensions extracted: birth date/place, nationality, occupation, field of work, position held, education level, awards, marital status, political affiliation. Coverage varies: high for demographics (85-95%), medium for professional/education (55-81%), low for derived psychological traits (0% - requires inference).
